---
title: "The Rt. Rev. George Richard Mackarness"
---

## The Rt. Rev. George Richard Mackarness

**Dates:** (1823-1883)

### Description

Bishop of Argyll and the Isles

### Biography

Brother of the Rt. Rev. John Fielder Mackarness, he became Bishop of Argyll in 1874.. He is listed as a contributor to the <i>Hursley Magazine</i>  in 1848 (the BL has his copy), and may perhaps have been one of Keble’s curates.  In the same volume another contributor is ‘Miss Young (Mrs G. R. Mackarness).  He married Mary Ann Young (b. Ireland 1823/4) in 1848, and secondly (1878) Gertrude Granville.

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 3d 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
